name: Go (alindesign)
description: Ubuntu base + alindesign dotfiles (zsh, starship, CLI tools) + Go via mise.

goVersion.description: Go version (passed to the go feature).

installTools.description: Space-separated `go install` specs to install at build time.

gitUserName.description: git user.name (optional; can also be set after the fact).

gitUserEmail.description: git user.email (optional; can also be set after the fact).
